“We need ZERO tolerance for those impeding ICE.”

@RealTomHoman says the DOJ must step up enforcement.

“When people start going to prison for this, it’ll stop — because right now they’re putting officers and communities in danger.”

Video

“Democrats want ILLEGAL immigrants counted for power.”

@RealTomHoman says opposition to enforcement is about long-term political gain.

“They opened the border, counted illegal aliens in the census for more House seats — and now they’re mad because we’re removing them and stopping that plan.”

Video

“Anti-ICE activists are helping DANGEROUS criminals escape.”

@RealTomHoman says interference with ICE operations is putting communities at risk.

“Seventy percent of those arrested are public safety threats or criminals — that’s who we’re taking off the streets to make this country safer.”

Video

“This judge is substituting his OWN judgment.”

@JonathanTurley criticizes a federal judge for trying to block changes to a vaccine advisory committee.

“He’s essentially saying, ‘I like the old experts better.’ But that’s not a judge’s decision — that’s a policy choice.”

Video

“Joe Kent’s service is beyond reproach — but the facts still matter.”

@dbongino pushes back on Kent’s conclusion.

“That doesn’t make this argument fact-based. Look at the evidence — Iran’s missiles, drones, and nuclear material.”

Video

“Iran started this war — Trump will FINISH it.”

@TimSheehyMT says critics are wrong to call the strategy chaotic.

“Three generations of Americans have faced this threat. President Trump isn’t going to kick it to a fourth — we’re dismantling the regime piece by piece.”

Video

This has been a sham alliance for decades — allies stepping in only when it suits them, while America carries the burden, foots the bill, and ultimately makes the world safer yet again.

Video

The Wall Street Journal (@WSJ)

Legalization of recreational marijuana by many states has made it easier for teens to get access to highly potent and convenient forms of the drug, creating new hazards for teen health.

The Washington Post is truly sick with this framing.  The new rule merely requires that those driving large, potentially dangerous, trucks on our roads be legally allowed to work and properly trained. No more CDL mills. Save lives. federalregister.gov/d/2026-0…



The Washington Post (@washingtonpost)

Some 200,000 immigrant truck drivers will begin to lose their commercial driver’s licenses as they expire under a new Trump administration rule that takes effect Monday. wapo.st/40ALq6V
